executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Becoming the AWS of cybersecurity — infrastructure primitives for MSSPs and security teams to build custom security stacks
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: LimaCharlie is positioning as a security infrastructure platform rather than a product. They provide telemetry collection, detection, response, and automation as composable building blocks. Their bet is that security teams want to build, not buy.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: Platform-first approach means the 'ecosystem' IS the product. 200+ detection rules in community marketplace. API-first design with full REST/gRPC coverage.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: Targeting MSSPs and security-mature organizations that want to build differentiated security offerings on top of shared infrastructure.
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Pure usage-based (per-sensor, per-event). No minimum commitment. Designed for MSSPs to white-label and resell with margin.

engineering_capacity.velocity_assessment: High — weekly releases, strong API surface expansion, community-driven detection content

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Small team (< 50). Hiring kernel engineers and distributed systems engineers. No sales team visible — community/developer-led growth.
intelligence_signals.target_users: MSSPs, security-mature enterprises building custom SecOps, and security tool builders
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Usage-based pricing with MSSP reseller model. Revenue grows as customers' sensor fleets grow. Low CAC via developer community.
intelligence_signals.differentiators: Only true security infrastructure platform (not a product). Full API coverage, composable primitives, white-label ready. Competes by enabling rather than replacing.

gaps_exposed: Securin has no platform/infrastructure play for MSSPs
No white-label capability for channel partners
API coverage not as comprehensive for build-on-top use cases
areas_of_focus: Evaluate MSSP/channel partner strategy — could Securin products be white-labeled?
Expand API surface for platform-style integrations
Consider LimaCharlie as potential integration partner (telemetry source for Securin analysis)

product_specific.ASM: LimaCharlie's sensor-based asset discovery is complementary, not competitive, to Securin's agentless ASM
product_specific.APT: Their detection engine + threat feeds could overlap with APT threat intelligence if they build analysis layers
